title: peucedanum morrisonicola
intro: Peucedanum morrisonicola, also known as Taiwan angelica, is a type of flowering plant in the carrot family, native to Taiwan. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Taiwan angelica include reducing fever, relieving pain, and soothing digestive issues. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, where it is typically combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
